shopFeatures.trustLine: Trusted by home brewers and cafés who care about the cup.

secureShopping.title: Secure checkout for your orders
secureShopping.description: Encrypted payments so your coffee order stays private and protected.

freeDelivery.title: Coffee delivered to your door

qualityAssured.title: Quality you can taste

fastProcessing.title: Roast-to-ship without delay
fastProcessing.description: Orders picked and packed quickly so your beans spend less time waiting.

bestPrices.title: Fair value on every bag

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Have questions about our coffee or need assistance? We'd love to hear from you. Our team is here to help.

info.title: Contact Information
info.quickResponseText: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

form.name: Full Name

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help with coffee selection, brewing, or your order...
form.successMessage: Thank you for contacting us. We’ve received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about coffee orders, brewing, and delivery.

questions.a: We pack roasted coffee carefully to preserve freshness in transit. Shipping timelines and rates are shown clearly at checkout.

questions.q: How can I track my order?
questions.a: Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number by email. You can also track it from your account dashboard.
We do not offer general returns. If there is a quality issue or an incorrect order, contact us and we’ll make it right.
Yes. Our support team is available Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM EST, for order help and brewing guidance.

shop.title: Shop Coffee
shop.description: Discover fresh roasts, signature blends, and brewing essentials

hero.title: Roaster's limited selection
hero.description: Hand-picked lots from our roastery and partner farms—special pricing on small batches while supplies last. Save up to {maxDiscount}% on these coffees.

lightning.title: Fresh-roasted picks
lightning.description: Curated coffees rotated on a short window so every cup stays vibrant.

premium.title: Farm & roast quality
premium.description: Traceable origins and careful roasting you can taste in the cup.

favorites.title: Crowd pleasers
favorites.description: Blends and single origins our guests reorder most often.

limited.title: Small batches
limited.description: When a lot is gone, it’s gone—grab yours before the next harvest.

collection.title: Limited roasts on the shelf
collection.description: Explore this week’s featured coffees at special prices. Quantities are limited to keep quality high.

noDeals.title: No limited roasts right now
noDeals.description: We’re lining up the next micro-lot drop. Check back soon or browse the full shop.

cta.title: Never miss a micro-lot drop
